response.justification: Exceptional match: currently Staff engineer using the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with active AI agent infrastructure work. 14+ years full-stack experience far exceeds the 6-year requirement, with demonstrated architectural expertise, testing culture leadership, and strong communication skills. Only minor gaps are explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, which are easily acquired given deep Node.js and testing framework background.
strengths: Current Staff role actively using TypeScript, Node.js, React with AI agent and MCP infrastructure work
14+ years full-stack experience with multiple senior-level roles demonstrating architecture and scalability expertise
Strong testing culture and mentoring background; created testing frameworks and led TDD/CI/CD adoption
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite strong Node.js expertise across multiple roles
Vitest specifically not mentioned, though demonstrated broad testing framework experience
Very recent in current role (April 2025, ~2 months), limiting proof of stability in this position
